title: Personality V1
description: Schema for LLM personality/identity documents used in prompt composition. Personalities define the identity, voice, and constraints for AI responses.

name.description: Unique personality name identifier (e.g., 'bitbrat_the_ai', 'helpful_assistant'). Used for lookup and resolution.

text.description: Full personality/identity prompt text. This is the actual content that gets composed into the system prompt.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the personality. Only 'active' personalities are resolved during prompt composition.

version.description: Version number for this personality. Incremented on updates. Higher versions are preferred when multiple exist.

platform.description: Optional LLM platform override. If set, this personality is preferred when using the specified platform.

model.description: Optional model override. If set, this personality is preferred when using the specified model (e.g., 'gpt-4o', 'llama3').

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this personality was created

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this personality was last updated

description.description: Optional human-readable description of what this personality does

examples.name: bitbrat_the_ai
examples.text: You are BitBrat, a witty and helpful AI assistant for streamers. You love gaming, technology, and helping creators engage with their communities. Keep responses concise and entertaining.

examples.name: technical_assistant
examples.text: You are a technical assistant specializing in software development and DevOps. Provide accurate, detailed technical guidance with code examples when appropriate.
